data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 7/1 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Aris (Maid), 3★ Toki (Bunny), 3★ Midori (Maid), 3★ Momoi (Maid)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 7/1 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 7/8 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
